Patch Set 16: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

Patch Set 16:

actually I wonder why don't we use normal own connections between LFSCK instances?

Patch Set 16:

(1 comment)

The communication from the LFSCK instance on the OST to the LFSCK instance on the MDT is read only RPC, no need to handle recovery issues. LWP connection is more suitable for such purpose. On the other hand, the OST needs to talk with MDT via such connection for querying something. If we establish normal connection between LFSCK instances directly, it is not convenient for the OFD to share it.

Patch Set 16:

LWP itself is a big hack and I'm not sure more users for that is nice idea.

Patch Set 16:

I did not aware of that before. I just reuse the existing simplest way to match the LFSCK requirement. Currently, except LFSCK, there are also others, such quota/FID to use such connection for kinds of read-only communications. If we want to remove/replace the LWP in the future, we can adjust them together.

Patch Set 16:

well, then we missed another chance to look at LWP closely. the more users, the more difficult to fix later.

Patch Set 16: Code-Review-1

needs rebase

Patch Set 16:

Alex: I agree with you that more users more difficult to be fixed. But just close to the deadline of 2.6 feature frozen deadline, it seems not a good time-point for fix that.

I will rebase the patch as Oleg suggested.
Uploaded patch set 17.

parents.subject: LU-4484 lbuild: add support for fresh versions of MPSS 3.x.x

commit.subject: LU-3951 lfsck: LWP connection from OST-x to MDT-y
commit.message:
LU-3951 lfsck: LWP connection from OST-x to MDT-y

When client sends object-based RPC to the OST-x, the RPC service
thread on the OST-x needs to verify whether the given parent FID
information in the client RPC matches the parent FID information
stored in the OST-object. If not match, it will query the MDT-y
according to the client given parent FID information. The query
RPC from the OST-x to the MDT-y is sent via LWP connection.

The other use case is that the LFSCK on the OST-x needs to talk
with the LFSCK on the MDT-y, such control/query RPC will be via
above LWP connection from OST-x to MDT-y.

Currently, we only support LWP connection frm OST-x to the MDT-0.
This patch enhance that to enable LWP connection from any OST to
any MDT.
